vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

verify.value: All required fields are present.
verify.rule: All fields in the schema must be present and correctly formatted.
The mass_est_g must be a numeric value within the design constraints.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are present in the geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each P0 internal_feature_target must appear as a part_tree child and geometry_ops id or target.

verify.value: All interfaces with neighboring subsystems are reciprocally defined.
verify.rule: Interfaces must state owner, mating geometry, and what is exchanged.

verify.value: Visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence for critical joints.
verify.rule: Critical joints must state locking method and torque/preload intent.
Boundary_conditions must include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Blocked access to equipment bay due to complex geometry.
risk.mit: Simplify geometry around the equipment bay for easier access.

risk.desc: Weak interface between motor pod and cooling inlet.
risk.mit: Increase the thickness of the cooling inlet channel walls.

risk.desc: Tolerance mismatch between wing spar reinforcement and adjacent structures.
risk.mit: Review and adjust the tolerance stack-up for all interfaces.

risk.desc: Process limitations with FDM + foam may affect surface finish.
risk.mit: Evaluate alternative manufacturing processes if surface finish is critical.

risk.desc: Unsafe overclaiming of structural integrity without proper verification.
risk.mit: Conduct thorough stress analysis and validate structural integrity.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion mismatch between EPP foam core and CFRP spar.
risk.mit: Monitor thermal expansion coefficients and adjust design if necessary.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient preload on critical bolted joints.
risk.mit: Ensure proper torque settings and use locking nuts or inserts.

risk.desc: Risk of moisture ingress through service access panel.
risk.mit: Use waterproof seals and gaskets on all access points.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate structural reinforcement in rib channels.
risk.mit: Increase rib channel thickness or add additional reinforcement ribs.

risk.desc: Risk of interference between sensor pocket and adjacent subsystems.
risk.mit: Review and adjust sensor pocket dimensions to ensure clearance.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path

Airflow over wing surface, through rib channels to wingtip

risk.desc: The mass budget of 500g may be too high for the subsystem scale.
risk.mit: Review the design for potential weight reduction opportunities.

risk.desc: The thermal dissipation from the wing structure to the servo may not be sufficient.
risk.mit: Increase the thermal dissipation paths or consider a more efficient servo.

risk.desc: The strain relief channels may not be sufficient to prevent cable damage.
risk.mit: Add additional strain relief features or increase the existing ones.

risk.desc: The access cover may be difficult to remove for maintenance.
risk.mit: Design the access cover to be more easily removable.

risk.desc: The wing mounting flange may not be strong enough to withstand the design loads.
risk.mit: Review the strength of the wing mounting flange and consider reinforcing it.
